headline: Is Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (JKHY) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is JKHY a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by Dynaheir-be. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on JKHY. Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.’s share was trading at $125.25 as of June 23rd. JKHY’s trailing and forward P/E were 17.24 and 17.09 […]
